vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa quy trình làm việc
vocab.example: I am particularly fond of Trello because its features help streamline the workflow for my group projects.

vocab.meaning: môi trường không có sự lộn xộn/rác mắt
vocab.example: Medium is my favorite platform because it offers a clutter-free environment that lets me focus entirely on the quality of the writing.
Reddit is a site where you can stumble upon fascinating subcultures and niche topics you never knew existed.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ một thị trường/đối tượng đặc thù
vocab.example: I frequent GitHub as it perfectly caters to a niche audience of developers seeking open-source collaboration.

vocab.meaning: khả năng truy cập không đối thủ (rất thuận tiện)
vocab.example: The unrivaled accessibility of Wikipedia makes it an indispensable tool for a quick fact-check on any subject.
